commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh In the same day shall the Lord shave with a hired razor, namely, by them beyond the river, by the king of Assyria, the head, and the hair of the feet: and it shall also consume the beard. Or cut off with scissors all the hair, as was done with lepers, (Leviticus xiv. ) and Levites, Numbers viii. The country shall be pillaged, and all shall be in mourning. (Calmet) The men shall be despised as no better than women and cowards. Jerome) (Theodoret) Hired. With large sums.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
